summary: Company stats bar feature and trust badges relocation verified. All features working correctly: stats bar displays 4 numbers in Meistä section, trust badges moved from footer to Meistä section, admin panel CRUD for stats works (add/edit/delete), footer no longer contains trust badges.
passed_tests: Homepage loads correctly with full React UI
Meistä section shows dark stats bar (#0F172A background) with 4 numbers: 300+, 3,7M€, 18, 40 000+
Trust badges visible in Meistä section below stats bar (inverted white logos on dark bg)
Footer does NOT contain trust badges anymore
Footer still shows company info, services list, and site links correctly
Admin panel login works (username: admin, password: jbadmin2024)
Admin panel shows 'Yrityksen avainluvut' section with 4 stat rows
Admin panel 'Lisää luku' button adds a new empty stat row
Admin panel delete button (trash icon) removes a stat row
Admin panel shows trust badge upload fields in Meistä section
Service page /maalaustyot-helsinki loads correctly with H1 'Maalaustyöt Helsingissä'
API endpoint /api/settings returns company_stats array with 4 items
API endpoint /api/settings returns footer_trust_badge_1 and footer_trust_badge_2 URLs
critical_code_review_comments: Company stats are stored in settings.company_stats as array of {value, label} objects
Trust badges are stored in settings.footer_trust_badge_1 and footer_trust_badge_2 (URLs)
Stats bar uses dark navy background (#0F172A) with white text
Trust badges use brightness-0 invert filter for white appearance on dark background
Admin panel stats management is in App.js around line 1680-1725
context_for_next_testing_agent: Company stats feature is complete. Stats are managed via admin panel Etusivu tab -> 'Yrityksen avainluvut' section. Trust badges are now in Meistä section (inside stats bar) instead of footer. The stats bar has data-testid='company-stats-bar' and trust badges have data-testid='about-trust-badges'.

trust_badges.location: Inside stats bar in Meistä section
